$comment: MCP server config. Connect Claude to your internal tools — docs, ticketing, search, analytics. Version-controlled so the team shares the same servers. Each new server should get a security review (it runs with your privileges). Delete the examples and add your real ones; remove this file if you have no MCP servers yet.

internal-docs-EXAMPLE.$note: A structured-search tool over internal docs is the article's canonical first MCP. Replace command/args/env with your server.

tickets-EXAMPLE.$note: Connect your issue tracker so Claude can read tickets directly.
